belier.intro: The Moon has moved to the very end of Aquarius, still in your eleventh house, and the waning gibbous light at 96 percent carries the immediate afterglow of last night's Full Moon revelation. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue their steady work in your own sign, asking you to integrate rather than announce whatever became clear last night. The Leo Sun in your fifth house keeps the mood warm even as the intensity settles.
belier.love: What a friend or group reflected back to you last night deserves quiet reflection today rather than immediate action. Let the insight settle before you decide what to do with it.
belier.work: A long-term goal that reached visibility last night now needs patient follow-through. Saturn retrograde rewards steady effort over dramatic gestures today.
belier.energy: The fire that peaked under the Full Moon settles into something more sustainable. Use today's calmer flame for consistent, unglamorous effort.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde keeps your inner compass gentle and slightly diffuse today. Give yourself space before making any decision that felt urgent last night.
belier.mantra: I integrate what I learned before I act on it.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at the close of Aquarius continues through your tenth house, and the waning gibbous phase softens last night's Full Moon revelation about your public direction into something you can actually work with. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your twelfth house keep processing private fears at a quieter pace today. The Leo Sun in your fourth house grounds you in home even as your professional path asks for continued attention.
taureau.love: A partner's reaction to last night's professional news deserves a calmer conversation today. Ask what they actually meant rather than assuming.
taureau.work: The recognition or reckoning from last night needs practical follow-up today. Take the next concrete step rather than dwelling on the emotional peak.
taureau.energy: Your earth element craves stability after last night's intensity. A routine day, deliberately unremarkable, restores your balance.
taureau.intuition: A private fear that surfaced last night is easier to name calmly today. Write it down if that helps you see it clearly.
taureau.mantra: I take the next practical step with a steady hand.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon completes its passage through Aquarius in your ninth house today, and the waning gibbous light carries forward last night's clarity about a belief or a bigger plan. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eleventh house continue refining which long-term goals truly deserve your energy. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps conversation lively even as bigger questions still linger from last night.
gemeaux.love: A difference in worldview that surfaced last night is worth revisiting today with more curiosity and less need to resolve it immediately.
gemeaux.work: A proposal or direction illuminated last night benefits from a second, calmer look today. Notice what still excites you in daylight.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy is more settled today than last night, well suited to organizing thoughts rather than generating new ones.
gemeaux.intuition: Your clarity about which goals still fit continues today, quieter but no less reliable. Trust the goal that survived the night.
gemeaux.mantra: I revisit my truth with patience, not pressure.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon at the edge of Aquarius continues through your eighth house, and the waning gibbous phase gives last night's emotional revelation room to settle into something workable. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your tenth house keep restructuring your definition of success at a patient pace. The Leo Sun in your own second house steadies your sense of worth as deeper currents continue processing.
cancer.love: The honesty that surfaced last night in a close bond deserves gentle follow-through today. Do not let the momentum fade into silence.
cancer.work: The career direction Saturn has been pressuring you to reconsider becomes easier to articulate today. Say it plainly to someone you trust.
cancer.energy: Give yourself permission to move slowly today; the receptivity that served you last night needs rest to recover fully.
cancer.intuition: Your read on what is truly shared in a close bond remains accurate today, calmer than last night but just as trustworthy.
cancer.mantra: I follow through gently on what I now know.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon finishes its transit of Aquarius directly opposite your Sun, and the waning gibbous light carries the emotional aftermath of last night's partnership revelation into a calmer, more workable form today. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your ninth house continue testing which beliefs about commitment are genuinely yours. With your own Sun still strong in Leo, you feel steadier today than the peak of last night.
lion.love: Whatever surfaced in a relationship last night deserves a follow-up conversation today, ideally a warmer and less charged one. Lead with generosity.
lion.work: A negotiation that reached its head last night benefits from a calmer second conversation today. State your terms with the same warmth as before.
lion.energy: Your fire settles into a glow rather than a blaze today. Use it for connection rather than confrontation.
lion.intuition: Your read on a partnership remains sharp today, though quieter. Trust what continues to feel true in daylight.
lion.mantra: I meet others today with warmth, not urgency.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon completes its pass through Aquarius in your sixth house, and the waning gibbous phase lets last night's clarity about routine or health settle into a practical plan today. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eighth house continue dissolving illusions about shared resources at a measured pace. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps private processing quietly active beneath your daily tasks.
vierge.love: A caretaking pattern that became visible last night is worth discussing calmly today, without blame on either side.
vierge.work: The habit that needed adjusting last night can now be addressed with a concrete first step rather than more analysis.
vierge.energy: Rest remains the right instruction today, though with less urgency than last night. A gentle pace serves you well.
vierge.intuition: Physical sensations that spoke clearly last night continue to guide you today. Keep listening rather than overriding them with busyness.
vierge.mantra: I take one practical step toward what I noticed.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon finishes its transit of Aquarius in your fifth house, and the waning gibbous light softens last night's creative or romantic peak into something you can now build on steadily. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your seventh house continue testing the honesty of a partnership at a patient pace. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendship a warm resource today.
balance.love: The spark or clarity from last night deserves a concrete next step today rather than staying a beautiful memory. Reach out.
balance.work: Whatever creative work reached visibility last night is ready for the next phase of development. Share it a little further today.
balance.energy: Your air element channels yesterday's expansiveness into today's focus well. Use the momentum before it fully fades.
balance.intuition: Your sense of which relationships bring out your best remains clear today. Act on it rather than only appreciating it.
balance.mantra: I build steadily on what brought me joy.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon completes its pass through Aquarius in your fourth house, and the waning gibbous phase gives last night's domestic revelation room to be addressed calmly today. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your sixth house continue dissolving illusions about daily habits at a measured pace. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps professional matters visible even as home continues to ask for attention.
scorpion.love: The family or domestic pattern that surfaced last night deserves a direct but gentler conversation today. Choose warmth over confrontation.
scorpion.work: Public visibility continues today, calmer than last night's peak. Let recognition settle without needing to chase more of it immediately.
scorpion.energy: Home-based ritual continues to serve you well today. Keep tending to the space you started clearing last night.
scorpion.intuition: Your instincts about family patterns remain sharp today. Use the clarity to plan a real conversation rather than only an internal reckoning.
scorpion.mantra: I address what surfaced with steady honesty.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon finishes its transit of Aquarius in your third house, and the waning gibbous light lets last night's conversation or local clarity settle into something actionable today. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your fifth house continue asking which creative pursuits deserve real commitment. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps bigger beliefs warm as smaller matters continue to resolve.
sagittaire.love: The direct conversation from last night deserves a warm follow-up today. Confirm what was said rather than assuming it landed as intended.
sagittaire.work: The communication or pitch that reached clarity last night is ready to be sent or delivered today. Do not let it sit unfinished.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire prefers movement today, a good day for a walk paired with continued conversation rather than stillness.
sagittaire.intuition: Your sense of which creative pursuit still holds meaning remains clear today. Take one small action toward it.
sagittaire.mantra: I follow through on the clarity I found.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon completes its pass through Aquarius in your second house, and the waning gibbous phase gives last night's clarity about money and worth room to become a plan today. Saturn, your ruling planet, retrograde in your third house continues demanding precise communication. The Leo Sun in your eighth house keeps shared resources a live topic even as personal worth takes priority.
capricorne.love: The conversation about shared finances from last night deserves a concrete follow-up today, ideally with numbers rather than feelings alone.
capricorne.work: The sense of your true worth that crystallized last night is worth acting on today, whether through a direct ask or a quiet decision to change course.
capricorne.energy: Saturn's discipline continues to serve you well today. Finish the precise task you started rather than beginning something new.
capricorne.intuition: Your instincts about your own value remain accurate today. Trust the boundary that formed last night and hold it.
capricorne.mantra: I turn my clarity about worth into a plan.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon completes its transit of your own sign at 29 degrees Aquarius today, the very last breath of last night's rare Full Moon in your first house. Pluto retrograde alongside it keeps the sense of transformation active even as the peak intensity fades. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your third house keep your thinking precise while your identity settles back into its everyday rhythm.
verseau.love: Being fully seen last night may feel exposing in daylight; let a partner's continued warmth reassure you that visibility was safe.
verseau.work: The peak visibility from last night settles into steady momentum today. Keep showing up as yourself rather than retreating.
verseau.energy: The amplification of last night's Full Moon in your own sign eases today. Use the calmer energy to integrate rather than perform.
verseau.intuition: Self-knowledge gained last night remains available today, quieter but still true. Trust what you learned about yourself.
verseau.mantra: I carry what I learned about myself into today.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon completes its pass through Aquarius in your twelfth house, and the waning gibbous phase lets last night's vivid dream or subconscious signal settle into daylight understanding. Saturn and Neptune retrograde, with Neptune ruling this house, continue their long dissolution of illusions around rest and escape. The Leo Sun in your sixth house grounds you in routine even as inward processing continues.
poissons.love: The private feeling that surfaced last night is easier to voice today, gently and without needing an immediate resolution.
poissons.work: The quiet preparation from last night is worth continuing today, even without visible recognition yet. Trust it will matter.
poissons.energy: Solitude remains valuable today, though less urgently than last night. A quiet hour restores you more than company.
poissons.intuition: The dream or image from last night deserves continued reflection today. Write it down before the details fade.
poissons.mantra: I let yesterday's depths inform today's steps.
poissons.author: Sibylle
